HGSS.566.0000:
Chuck: Ooomph!
The pounding waterfall right onto\r
my head...\r
Arrgh!\f
Why did you stop the waterfall from
pouring on me!\f
You just spoiled my training!
I have to warn you that I am a strong\r
Trainer training every day under\r
this waterfall!\f
What?
It has nothing to do with Pokémon?\f
...
That’s true!\f
...
...\f
Come on. We shall do battle!\f
HGSS.566.0002:
There! Scared now, are you?\f
What?
It has nothing to do with Pokémon?\r
That’s true!\r
Come on. We shall do battle!\f
HGSS.566.0003:
Chuck: Hmm... I lost?\f
How about that!
All right. You’re worthy of\r
the Storm Badge!\f
HGSS.566.0004:
[0103,0000,0000] received
the Storm Badge from Chuck!
HGSS.566.0005:
Chuck: The Storm Badge lets your
Pokémon Fly to any city or town you’ve\r
already been to!\f
Here, take this, too!\f
HGSS.566.0006:
Chuck: That is Focus Punch.\f
It doesn’t land if the foe you’re
attacking hits you first, but it’s very\r
powerful if it manages to hit!
HGSS.566.0007: Argh... Your Bag is jammed full!
HGSS.566.0008:
Chuck: Wahahah!
I enjoyed battling you!\f
But a loss is a loss!\f
From now on, I’m going to train
24 hours a day!
HGSS.566.0009:
He’s so into his training, he
doesn’t seem to notice you.
HGSS.566.0010:
There is a large winch.
Will you turn it? [0200,0000]
HGSS.566.0011:
[0103,0000,0000] turned the winch
with pure might!\f
HGSS.566.0014:
Cianwood City Pokémon Gym\f
Leader: Chuck
Certified Trainer!\r
[0103,0000,0000]
